text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Check out #mod-guidelines to get started.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You're now a member. Feel free to introduce yourself and explore the channels.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Check out #mentorship to connect with mentees.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Head to #events to see upcoming activities.
